index.levelDescription: We are SHICS Modern School Offering girls and boys aged 3-14 a strategically designed education with faith and exellence.
admission.title: Admission
admission.intro: We’re delighted you are interested in finding out about Exeter Cathedral School. As the school’s Admissions Manager, my role is to help guide you through the process, from arranging your personal visit and child’s taster day, right through to preparing for their very first day.
admission.qualities: We are often asked what qualities we look for in a child who might like to come to Exeter Cathedral School. For us, the answer is… enthusiasm! Pupils need to be prepared to get involved and to engage with the wide array of activities and opportunities that make our school so distinctive.
admission.visit: The very best way to discover life at Exeter Cathedral School is to come and see us for yourself. During your visit, you will have the opportunity to meet our Headmaster and pupils, offering you the time to ask any questions you may have, as well as tour our facilities and grounds.
admission.contactInfo: At any point in the school year, should you like any help or advice regarding the admissions process, you would be more than welcome to contact me through our enquiry form, or directly via the following: admissions@exetercs.org | 01392 255 298
